title: Positive flow: Selecting age group and proceeding
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Select an age group in the 'Male' section. | Select an age group in the 'Female' section. | Click on the 'SKIP' button at the bottom.
expected_result: The app should proceed to the next onboarding screen. | The 'SKIP' button should be disabled after selection.

title: Negative flow: Skipping age selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'SKIP' button at the bottom.
expected_result: The app should proceed to the next onboarding screen. | The 'SKIP' button should be disabled after selection.

title: Negative flow: Invalid age selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Select an invalid age group in the 'Male' section. | Select an invalid age group in the 'Female' section. | Click on the 'SKIP' button at the bottom.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating invalid age selection. | The 'SKIP' button should be disabled after selection.

title: Negative flow: Missing age selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Click on the 'SKIP' button at the bottom without selecting an age group.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating missing age selection. | The 'SKIP' button should be disabled after selection.

title: UI test: Age selection grid visibility
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Verify that the age selection grid is visible and accessible.
expected_result: The age selection grid should be visible and accessible.

title: Accessibility test: Skip button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Verify that the 'SKIP' button is accessible.

title: Usability test: Age selection flow
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding screen. | Select an age group in the 'Male' section. | Select an age group in the 'Female' section. | Click on the 'SKIP' button at the bottom.
expected_result: The app should proceed to the next onboarding screen smoothly.
